---
title: "A few World Heritage Sites"
author: "Mark Deming"
date: "2024-02-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Packages
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(extrafont)

# Data
url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/master/data/2024/2024-02-06/heritage.csv"
dat <- read_csv(url(url))

# Define colors
swe04 <- "#4472D1"
swe22 <- "#6493E5"
swePt <- "#3660C2" 
den04 <- "#DE5F4A" 
den22 <- "#E37D6C"
denPt <- "#C54E44" 
nor04 <- "#2A324E"
nor22 <- "#444B63" 
norPt <- "#192039" 

# Manipulate data
lng_dat <- dat %>%
  
  # Reshape data to wide format
  pivot_longer(cols = -country,
              names_to = "year",
              values_to = "sites") %>%

  # New variable of sites added by year
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(sites_added = sites - lag(sites),
         sites_added = ifelse(is.na(sites_added), sites, sites_added)) %>%

  # Add row numbers
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(id = factor(row_number())) %>%

  # Reorder factors variables
  mutate(country = factor(country, levels = c("Sweden", "Denmark", "Norway")),
         year = as.numeric(as.character(year)))

########### Plot ############

p <- ggplot(lng_dat, 
            aes(x = country, 
                y = sites_added,
                fill = fct_rev(id))) +

  # Add bar plot 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",
           width = .25) +
  
  # Flip x and y axes
  coord_flip() +
  
  # Set colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(swe22, swe04, den22, den04, nor22, nor04),
                    guide = "none") +
  
  # Add points for Sweden
  geom_point(x = 1, y = 0, size =  11, color = swe04) +
  geom_point(x = 1, y = 13, size = 11, color = swe04) +
  geom_point(x = 1, y = 15, size = 11, color = swe22) +
  geom_point(x = 1, y = 13, size = 9, color = swePt) +
  geom_point(x = 1, y = 15, size = 9, color = swePt) +
  
  # Add points for Denmark
  geom_point(x = 2, y = 0, size =  11, color = den04) +
  geom_point(x = 2, y = 4, size =  11, color = den04) +
  geom_point(x = 2, y = 10, size = 11, color = den22) +
  geom_point(x = 2, y = 4, size = 9, color = denPt) +
  geom_point(x = 2, y = 10, size = 9, color = denPt) +
  
  # Add points for Norway
  geom_point(x = 3, y = 0, size = 11, color = nor04) +
  geom_point(x = 3, y = 5, size = 11, color = nor04) +
  geom_point(x = 3, y = 8, size = 11, color = nor22) +
  geom_point(x = 3, y = 5, size = 9, color = norPt) +
  geom_point(x = 3, y = 8, size = 9, color = norPt) +
  
  # Add labels to points
  geom_text(aes(x = country, 
                label = sites),
                position = position_stack(vjust = 1),
                color = "white",
                size = 3) +
  
  # Label years in lieu of legend
  geom_text(aes(x = .8, y = 13), label = "2004", family = "Arial") +
  geom_text(aes(x = .8, y = 15), label = "2022", family = "Arial") +
  
  # Adjust theme() elements
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(family = "Arial Black",
                                   hjust = 0,
                                   size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(family = "Arial",
                                  size = 12),
        plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.margin = margin(3,5,3,5)) +
  
  # Set title and axis labels
  labs(title = "#6",
       x = "",
       y = "")

# Save plot
# ggsave(here("rounded_barplot6.png"), p)

# Print plot in HTML
p
```
